zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Rokesley於1299年5月出生在英國肯特盧可利時，她的父親Richard Rokesley25歲，母親Joan Criol28歲。她於大約1317年與Thomas de Poynings在英國素可波尼斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1349年12月22日在英國素可波尼斯享年50歲，埋葬在英國素可波尼斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Rokesley于1299年5月出生在英国肯特盧可利时，她的父亲Richard Rokesley25岁，母亲Joan Criol28岁。她于大约1317年与Thomas de Poynings在英国素可波尼斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1349年12月22日在英国素可波尼斯享年50岁，埋葬在英国素可波尼斯。

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Rokesley was born in May 1299, in Ruxley, Kent, England, her father, Richard Rokesley, was 25 and her mother, Joan Criol, was 28. She married Thomas de Poynings about 1317, in Poynings, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 22 December 1349, in Poynings, Sussex, England, at the age of 50, and was buried in Poynings, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Rokesley est née en mai 1299, à Ruxley, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Richard Rokesley, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Joan Criol, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas de Poynings environ 1317, à Poynings, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 22 décembre 1349, à Poynings, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterrée à Poynings, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Rokesley im Mai 1299 in Ruxley, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Rokesley 25 und ihre Mutter Joan Criol 28. Sie hat um 1317 in Poynings, Sussex, England Thomas de Poynings geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 22. Dezember 1349 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Poynings, Sussex, England und wurde in Poynings, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Rokesley è nata il nel maggio 1299 nel Ruxley, Kent, England, sua padre, Richard Rokesley, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Joan Criol, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Thomas de Poynings circa 1317, nel Poynings, Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 22 dicembre 1349, nel Poynings, Sussex, England, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolta a Poynings, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Rokesleyが1299年5月にイギリスケントルクスリーで生まれた時，父Richard Rokesleyは25歳，母Joan Criolは28歳であった。約1317年にイギリススセックスポイニングズでThomas de Poyningsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1349年12月22日にイギリススセックスポイニングズで50歳で死去し，イギリススセックスポイニングズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Rokesley(이)가 1299년 5월 영국 켄트 루스리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Rokesley(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Criol(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 대략 1317년 영국 수세스 포이닝스에서 Thomas de Poynings(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1349년 12월 22일 영국 수세스 포이닝스에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 포이닝스에 묻혔다.

mn.May 1299–22 December 1349: 1299 оны Тавдугаар сар–1349 оны Арванхоёрдугаар сарын 22

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Rokesley nasceu em maio de 1299, em Ruxley, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Rokesley, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Joan Criol, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas de Poynings aproximadamente 1317, em Poynings, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 22 de dezembro de 1349, em Poynings, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 50 anos, e foi sepultada em Poynings, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Rokesley родилась май 1299 г. в местности руксли, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Rokesley было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Criol, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas de Poynings около 1317 г. в местности поинингс, суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 22 декабря 1349 г. в местности поинингс, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 50 лет и была похоронена в местности поинингс, суссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Rokesley nació en mayo de 1299, en Ruxley, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Rokesley, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Joan Criol, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Thomas de Poynings aproximadamente 1317, en Poynings, Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 22 de diciembre de 1349, en Poynings, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultada en Poynings, Sussex, Inglaterra.
